title: fix(auth): stop inferring BYOP app identity from redirect URL + close metadata escalation
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Securing the hive's keys
gist.blurb: We've tightened up our authentication logic to make sure app identities are strictly verified and API keys are more secure than ever.
gist.summary: Updated the authentication system to strictly verify app identities via client IDs and secured API key metadata against unauthorized modifications.
gist.impact: App attribution is now more reliable for developers, and the platform's core security is significantly strengthened.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a locksmith or friendly security guard, inspecting glowing API keys. A chunky retro terminal showing a lock icon.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny security guard hat, inspecting a glowing golden key. A chunky retro terminal nearby displays a green padlock icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny security guard hat, inspecting a glowing golden key. A chunky retro terminal nearby displays a green padlock icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
